evals.prompt: Review this Preact screen for the most important correctness, compatibility, and performance issues. Prioritize high-impact findings first.
evals.expected_output: The review should identify the async waterfall and point to the relevant async rule before lower-value micro-optimizations.

evals.prompt: Review this Preact + Zustand component and call out the highest-value rerender issues without proposing architecture churn.
evals.expected_output: The review should flag broad selector shape and effect-mirrored state before generic memoization advice.

evals.prompt: Refactor this component to remove unnecessary rerender work while preserving the current stack and behavior.
evals.expected_output: The refactor should derive cheap state during render and keep interaction logic out of effects when possible.

evals.prompt: Refactor this compat-sensitive file with minimal churn. Improve correctness and performance without changing the import model unless it is actually broken.
evals.expected_output: The refactor should preserve compat boundaries, avoid signals, and fix the actual issues instead of rewriting the stack.
